meta.dc:title: Continuance of contracts and public improvements

section.heading: Continuance of contracts and public improvements

content.p: All contracts entered into by the city or for its benefit prior to the effective date of this Charter, shall continue in full force and effect. Public improvements for which proceedings have been instituted under laws existing at the time this Charter takes effect, in the discretion of the council, may be carried to completion as nearly as practicable in accordance with the provisions of such existing laws or may be continued or perfected under this Charter.
